Title: High-resolution mass models of dwarf galaxies from LITTLE THINGS 
Authors: Oh S.-H., Hunter D.A., Brinks E., Elmegreen B.G., Schruba A., 
         Walter F., Rupen M.P., Young L.M., Simpson C.E., Johnson M., 
         Herrmann K.A., Ficut-Vicas D., Cigan P., Heesen V., Ashley T., 
         Zhang H. 
Figure: The CDM NFW dark matter model rotation curves
================================================================================
Byte-by-byte Description of file: dbfA-C.txt
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Bytes Format Units   Label  Explanations
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   1-  6 F6.3   ---     Con    Model concentration parameter
   8- 10 I3     km/s    V200   Model rotation velocity at R_200_; see Equ. 7
  12- 20 F9.6   ---     R      Model radius scaled by R0.3
  22- 29 F8.6   ---     V      Model rotation velocity scaled by V0.3
  31- 38 F8.6   ---   e_V      Uncertainty in V
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
